en: He cooks spinach puffs day in and day out.
I've actually never made spinach puffs.
ko: 사실 시금치 퍼프 만든 적 없어.

en: You're ruining my baby.
My spinach puffs.
It's been wonderful being a part of the Emperors New Groove.

en: And two of my sons right here, Talon and Gabriel,

I'm so proud of you guys.
